subject: Transmittal - Revised Structural Drawings S-401 through S-410 - Waterfront Tower
body:
Sarah / Mike,

Please find attached the revised structural drawings for the Waterfront Mixed-Use Tower, Levels 15-25. These incorporate the changes from Addendum 3 and address the connection details raised in RFI-247.

Drawings included:
- S-401 Rev 3: Structural Framing Plan Level 15
- S-402 Rev 3: Structural Framing Plan Level 16
- S-403 Rev 2: Structural Framing Plan Level 17-20 (Typical)
- S-405 Rev 3: Connection Details Sheet 1
- S-406 Rev 2: Connection Details Sheet 2
- S-410 Rev 1: Miscellaneous Steel Details

Key changes highlighted in revision clouds. Please confirm receipt and update your sets accordingly.

Priya Patel
Project Architect
Thornton Architects

subject: Drawing Transmittal - Bridge Deck Reinforcing Details - Highway 401
body:
David,

Transmitting the revised bridge deck reinforcing details for the Highway 401 Bridge Replacement. These drawings supersede the previous issue dated February 15.

Changes:
- Increased top mat reinforcing from #5 @ 6" to #6 @ 5" per updated load rating
- Added additional shear studs on girder top flanges
- Revised concrete cover from 2" to 2.5" for durability

Please note these changes may affect your rebar procurement. Let me know if the revised quantities impact your schedule.

James Morrison, P.Eng.
Principal Engineer
Morrison Engineering Group
